# WaterLily.jl Рђћ Agent Quick Reference

## WaterLily ecosystem: https://github.com/WaterLily-jl/<repo-name>

- WaterLily.jl (core solver)
- WaterLilyMeshBodies.jl (STL and triangle meshes)
- ParametricBodies.jl (NURBS and parametric geometry)
- BiotSavartBCs.jl (external-flow boundary conditions)
- LilyPad.jl (semi-Lagrangian solver)
- CoupledSimulations.jl (multiphysics coupling)

For more details on each repository see: llms-ecosystem.txt

## WaterLily script pattern

- Define a simulation constructor function.
- Define body motion through maps.
- Advance the simulation in time with sim_step!.
- Visualize from sim.flow fields.
- Store all problem-specific logic in a few small functions.

Non-trivial canonical example: TwoD_MultipleAbstractBodies.jl
```julia
using WaterLily, StaticArrays, ParametricBodies, GLMakie, CUDA

function circle_and_foil(L=2^6;Re=550,U=1,mem=CUDA.CuArray,T=Float32)
    # A moving circle using AutoBody
    circle = AutoBody((x,t)->Рѕџsum(abs2,x)-L├и2, (x,t)->x-SA[L+U*t,3L├и2-10])

    # A foil defined by the intersection of the upper and lower surface
    upper = ParametricBody(BSplineCurve(SA{T}[5L 4L 3L 3L; 2L 5L├и2 5L├и2 2L],degree=3))
    lower = ParametricBody(BSplineCurve(SA{T}[3L 5L; 2L 2L],degree=1))
    foil = upper РѕЕ lower

    # Simulate the flow past the two general bodies
    Simulation((10L,4L), (U,0), L; ╬й=U*L/Re, body=foil+circle, mem, T)
end

# make a simulation and run it
viz!(circle_and_foil(),duration=9,clims=(-0.1,0.1))
```

## Creating new scripts from examples

**Always read the relevant `examples/` file before writing code.** This file is an API index and list of gotchas Рђћ not a substitute for the examples.

When multiple features are needed:

1. Start from the example with the closest primary physics.
2. Add secondary features from other examples.

Physics -> key example
Moving body ..................... TwoD_Hover.jl
Initial condition ............... ThreeD_TaylorGreenVortex.jl
Multiple bodies ................. TwoD_MultipleAbstractBodies.jl
No-slip walls ................... TwoD_LidCavity.jl
Fluid-structure-interaction ..... TwoD_FreeRotatingEllipse.jl
VTK output / restart ............ SaveVTK.jl

Complete example index at the bottom of the file.

Recipe: flow around multiple mesh-defined bodies

- Start from a multibody example (like MultipleAbstractBodies)
- Find relevant WaterLilyMeshBodies/example and replace Autobody/ParametricBody with MeshBody

Recipe: flapping foil near a no-slip wall

- Start from a dynamic body example (like Hover)
- Read no-slip examples and enforce no-slip BC on a wall
- Find relevant ParametricBodies/example to replace body with a foil
- Specialize mapping for the specific case

---

## Constructor

```julia
Simulation(dims, u_BC, L; ╬й, body, U=1, T=Float64, mem=Array, u╬╗=nothing,
           g=nothing, perdir=(), exitBC=false, ¤х=1)
```

| Parameter | Notes |
|---|---|
| `dims` | Interior grid size tuple. Each dimension should be a small multiple of a power of two. Actual arrays are `dims .+ 2` (ghost layer). |
| `u_BC` | Per-dimension boundary velocity, e.g. `(U,0)`. Or `Ut(i,x,t)` for time-varying. |
| `L` | Reference length in cells. Set `╬й=U*L/Re`. |
| `╬й` | Kinematic viscosity. **Greek nu U+03BD Рђћ not Latin v.** Copy from examples. |
| `T`, `mem` | Float type and array backend. GPU: `T=Float32, mem=CuArray` (NVIDIA) or `mem=ROCArray` (AMD). |
| `u╬╗(i, xyz)` | Initial velocity; `i` is component index, `xyz` is position vector. See `ThreeD_TaylorGreenVortex.jl`. |
| `g(i, x, t)` | Spatially-uniform body force. See `TwoD_OscillatingFlowOverCircle.jl`. |
| `perdir` | Tuple of periodic directions, e.g. `perdir=(1,2)`. |
| `exitBC=true` | Convective outlet BC on the x-direction exit face. |

---

## Body definition

```julia
body = AutoBody(sdf)           # static: sdf(x,t) Рєњ signed distance (negative inside)
body = AutoBody(sdf, map)      # moving/deforming: map(x,t) applied before sdf
```

- AutoDiff computes normals and surface velocities from `sdf` and `map` automatically.
- **Always use `SA[...]` (StaticArrays) inside `sdf`/`map`** Рђћ plain arrays cause massive allocations.
- Set operations: `A РѕЕ B` (intersection), `A Рѕф B` / `A + B` (union). See `TwoD_Square.jl`.
- Many bodies: `sum(iter) do ...; AutoBody(...); end`. See `TwoD_MultipleBodies.jl`.

## Coordinates and motion maps

Coordinates are indexed as x[1], x[2], x[3] corresponding to (x,y,z).
Motion maps are applied before sdf evaluation. See TwoD_Hover.jl for the canonical moving-body implementation.

---

## Stepping and time

```julia
sim_step!(sim)           # single adaptive time step
sim_step!(sim, t_end)    # advance TO absolute time t_end (not by t_end)
sim_time(sim)            # current time in convective units U*t/L
```

Standard loop: iterate over absolute times with `range(tРѓђ, tРѓђ+duration; step=0.1)`.

---

## Key fields

| Expression | Description |
|---|---|
| `sim.flow.u` | Velocity; shape `(n,m,2)` or `(n,m,p,3)`. **Component-last:** `u[I,i]` is component `i` at `CartesianIndex I`. Face-centred (staggered). |
| `sim.flow.p` | Pressure. Cell-centred. |
| `sim.flow.¤Ѓ` | Scratch scalar workspace. May be overwritten internally. |
| `sim.flow.╬ћt[end]` | Current timestep. |
| `sim.L`, `sim.U`, `sim.flow.╬й` | Reference scales. |

- **Ghost cells:** arrays include one ghost layer on each face. Use `@inside` or `inside(a)` to restrict to physical cells.
- **GPU:** pipe to CPU before any plot or file write Рђћ `sim.flow.u |> Array`.
- **Staggered grid:** velocity is face-centred; averaging required for cell-centre magnitude. See `TwoD_LidCavity.jl`.

```julia
@inside sim.flow.¤Ѓ[I] = WaterLily.curl(3, I, sim.flow.u)   # 2D vorticity
@inside sim.flow.¤Ѓ[I] = WaterLily.╬╗Рѓѓ(I, sim.flow.u)        # 3D ╬╗Рѓѓ criterion
```

---

## Forces

```julia
total_force(sim)      # pressure + viscous on all bodies combined
pressure_force(sim)
viscous_force(sim)
```

`total_force` sums over **all** bodies. For per-body forces in a multi-body sim, see `TwoD_MultipleBodies.jl`. 
Forces and moments are returned in simulation units and should typically be scaled before saving, see Shark.jl & ThreeD_SphereLESBiotSavart.jl for 2D and 3D examples.

---

## Visualization

- **2D gif:** `sim_gif!(sim; duration, clims, plotbody)` Рђћ requires `Plots.jl`.
- **3D / live:** `viz!(sim; duration, step, ...)` Рђћ requires `GLMakie.jl`. `viz!` accepts a scalar-field filler `f(arr, sim)`.
- See `ThreeD_TaylorGreenVortex.jl` for a full GLMakie example.

---

## Other features (see linked examples for usage)

| Feature | Key function(s) | Example |
|---|---|---|
| VTK output | `vtkWriter`, `save!` | `ThreeD_HoverWriteVTK.jl`, `ThreeD_CylinderVTKRestart.jl` |
| JLD2 restart | `save!`, `load!` | `TwoD_MeanCircleJLD2.jl` |
| VTK restart | `restart_sim!` | `ThreeD_CylinderVTKRestart.jl` |
| Mean flow / Reynolds stresses | `MeanFlow`, `WaterLily.update!`, `uu` | `TwoD_MeanCircleJLD2.jl`, `ThreeD_SphereLESBiotSavart.jl` |
| Pressure solver log | `WaterLily.logger`, `plot_logger` | `TwoD_Circle.jl` |
| No-slip domain BCs | Override `WaterLily.mom_step!` | `TwoD_LidCavity.jl`, `TwoD_Channel.jl` |
| FSI (OrdinaryDiffEq) | Couple `sim_step!` with ODE solver | `TwoD_CircleVIV.jl` |
| AutoDiff optimisation | Differentiable through `sim_step!` | `TwoD_TandemFoilOptim.jl` |

**VTK / ParaView:** arrays include ghost cells Рђћ use ExtractSubset Рєњ VOI to trim. Tensor fields need `permutedims(T, (4,1,2,3))` before writing.

---

## Common mistakes

- **Wrong `╬й` symbol:** `╬й` is U+03BD (Greek nu), not Latin `v`. Copy from examples.
- **Array sizes not powers of 2:** The geometric multigrid requires this. Use `2^n` or multiples.
- **Plotting GPU arrays directly:** Always do `|> Array` before any CPU-side plot or file write.
- **Forgetting `StaticArrays` inside sdf/map:** Causes massive allocations. Always `using StaticArrays` and use `SA[...]`.
- **`total_force` returns combined force:** It sums over all bodies. See `TwoD_MultipleBodies.jl` for per-body force extraction.
- **Ghost cell indexing:** Use `@inside` or `inside(a)` to restrict to physical cells. Whole-array operations include ghost layers.
- **`sim_step!(sim, t_end)` is absolute, not relative:** It advances to time `t_end`, not by `t_end`.
- **CFL is diffusion-limited at low Re:** `CFL` includes a `5╬й` diffusive term, so `╬ћt РѕЮ 1/(U/╬ћx + 5╬й/╬ћx┬▓)`. At low Re (high ╬й) the timestep is set by diffusion, not convection.

## Adding no-slip domain BCs

The default domain BCs are reflection with Neumann conditions for the tangential velocity. There are two examples applying no-slip tangential BCs, `TwoD_LidCavity.jl` and `TwoD_Channel.jl`. Both use a simple helper function to update the tangential ghost velocities and overwrite `WaterLily.mom_step!` to call this function after each flow update.

---

## Example index

| File | What it demonstrates |
|---|---|
| `TwoD_Circle.jl` | Minimal 2D external flow, pressure logger |
| `TwoD_CirclePeriodicBC.jl` | Periodic BCs, moving body with `mod` in sdf |
| `TwoD_CircleVIV.jl` | FSI with OrdinaryDiffEq.jl, 1-DOF VIV |
| `TwoD_FreeRotatingEllipse.jl` | RigidMap FSI, free rotation |
| `TwoD_MeanCircleJLD2.jl` | JLD2 restart, MeanFlow statistics |
| `TwoD_Hover.jl` | Moving+rotating body via map, manual gif loop |
| `TwoD_Julia.jl` | Complex SDF (Julia logo) |
| `TwoD_LidCavity.jl` | Custom BC!, overriding mom_step! |
| `TwoD_Square.jl` | AutoBody set operations (РѕЕ) |
| `TwoD_MultipleBodies.jl` | Union of many AutoBodies, per-body forces |
| `TwoD_MultipleAbstractBodies.jl` | ParametricBodies + AutoBody combined |
| `TwoD_OscillatingFlowOverCircle.jl` | Body force `g`, periodic BCs |
| `TwoD_SlowStartCircle.jl` | Time-varying `u_BC` function |
| `TwoD_TandemFoilOptim.jl` | AutoDiff optimisation through sim |
| `TwoD_Triangle.jl` | Custom analytic SDF |
| `TwoD_UnicodePlots.jl` | Terminal-only visualisation |
| `TwoD_Channel.jl` | Channel flow, periodic and body-force in x, no-slip in y |
| `ThreeD_TaylorGreenVortex.jl` | 3D, `u╬╗` IC, `T=Float32`, GPU, GLMakie viz |
| `ThreeD_Donut.jl` | 3D torus SDF, GPU, live Makie |
| `ThreeD_Jelly.jl` | 3D moving body, GPU |
| `ThreeD_HoverWriteVTK.jl` | 3D extruded sdf, VTK output |
| `ThreeD_CylinderVTKRestart.jl` | VTK write + restart |
| `ThreeD_SphereLESBiotSavart.jl` | LES, BiotSavart BCs, turbulence statistics |
| `notebooks/Shark.jl` | Pluto notebook: fish SDF + traveling wave map |
